title: Rubio says US expects to finish Iran war 'in next couple of weeks'
summary_full: Marco Rubio said US allies were open to helping escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz, which Iran has closed and threatened to charge fees for.
summary_public: Marco Rubio said US allies were open to helping escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz, which Iran has closed and threatened to charge fees for.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran has closed and threatened to charge fees for
